decisions.decision: Use hybrid mock approach: mock useMarket, useProbabilityEdit, useSession at module level; wrap in real AssumptionProvider with Seeder pattern for assumption toggle tests
alternatives_rejected: Fully mocking useAssumptions — would only verify mock calls, not real context toggle logic
Using real providers for everything — useMarket and useProbabilityEdit depend on react-query and API calls, too complex to wire up

decisions.decision: Test exact mutation payload shape including conditional variableId logic (isTargetMarket branch), with two test cases: marketId === targetMarket.id and marketId !== targetMarket.id
alternatives_rejected: Only asserting mutation.mutate was called — misses the conditional variableId logic on line 52 which is the most important behavioral branch

decisions.decision: Include mutation success/error/pending message rendering tests
alternatives_rejected: Excluding them — trivial to add and the TradingPanel.test.tsx precedent validates this pattern

decisions.decision: Use fireEvent for all interactions, consistent with all 14+ existing test files in the codebase
alternatives_rejected: @testing-library/user-event — not used anywhere in the codebase, would require new dependency

decisions.decision: crypto.randomUUID() is irrelevant since useProbabilityEdit is mocked — no polyfill needed
alternatives_rejected: Adding a vi.stubGlobal polyfill — unnecessary since mocking useProbabilityEdit means handleSubmitEdit never actually runs

decisions.decision: Two market fixtures: 'otherMarket' (marketId !== targetMarket.id, shows Assume buttons) and 'targetMarket' used as both marketId and targetMarket (hides Assume buttons, uses targetMarket.variableId for edits)
alternatives_rejected: Single fixture — cannot test both code paths for isTargetMarket conditional

steps.task: Create frontend/src/__tests__/VariableRow.test.tsx with module-level mocks (useMarket, useProbabilityEdit, useSession), fixture data (targetMarket, otherMarket, configuredSession, unconfiguredSession), defaultMutationState helper, and renderVariableRow helper that wraps in AssumptionProvider with Seeder pattern

Write rendering tests: returns null when useMarket has no data; renders market title and outcomes with probabilities; renders '(current)' label for target market; does not render '(current)' for non-target market

Write assumption toggle tests (non-target market only): Assume button renders for each outcome; clicking Assume adds assumption and shows 'ASSUMED: outcomeId' badge and '✓ Assumed' button text; clicking again removes assumption; Assume button does NOT render when marketId === targetMarket.id

Write edit flow tests: Edit button renders when session is configured; Edit button hidden when not configured; clicking Edit shows slider and Set/Cancel buttons; changing slider updates displayed probability; clicking Set calls mutation.mutate with correct payload (accountId, variableId, target, context, session); verify conditional variableId: uses targetMarket.variableId when isTargetMarket, uses m.variableId otherwise; clicking Cancel hides slider

Write mutation feedback tests: Set button shows '…' and is disabled when isPending; success message renders 'Edit accepted: {orderId}'; error message renders error.message for Error instances; error message renders 'Edit failed' for non-Error
Run vitest on VariableRow.test.tsx to verify all tests pass, fix any failures
